title: NodeStatusEnvelope
description: Shared envelope carrying a UTC timestamp for node status messages. The `data` field contains a tagged `StatusData` enum, producing JSON like: `{"ts": "...", "data": {"type": "Online", "session": "a8f2c1", "version": "0.1.0"}}`

StatusData.description: Discriminated union for node status — either online or offline. Serializes with a `"type"` tag following the `TelemetryData` pattern.

oneOf.description: Status data published when the node connects to the MQTT broker.

session.description: Short random session ID generated per connection (6-char hex).

oneOf.description: Status data set as MQTT Last Will — published by the broker when the node disconnects unexpectedly.

last_online.description: Timestamp of the last successful connection.

last_session.description: Session ID from the last successful connection.
